name: @nuxtlib/consent
description: Nuxt cookie consent module with composable, banner, and optional provider sync helpers

scripts.dev:prepare: nuxt-module-build build --stub && nuxt-module-build prepare && nuxt prepare playgrounds/without-i18n && nuxt prepare playgrounds/with-i18n
scripts.dev:no-i18n: npm run dev:prepare && nuxt dev playgrounds/without-i18n --port 3001
scripts.dev:i18n: npm run dev:prepare && nuxt dev playgrounds/with-i18n --port 3002
scripts.dev:build: nuxt build playgrounds/without-i18n && nuxt build playgrounds/with-i18n
scripts.release: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run prepack && changelogen --release && npm publish && git push --follow-tags
scripts.test:types: vue-tsc --noEmit && cd playgrounds/without-i18n && vue-tsc --noEmit && cd ../with-i18n && vue-tsc --noEmit
